name: IFMIS Core System
description: Core Integrated Financial Management Information System for national budget execution and expenditure tracking.
notes: Core system. Real-time integration for budget execution monitoring.

name: Bank of Zambia RTGS
description: Bank of Zambia real-time gross settlement system for government payment processing.
notes: All government payments processed through this system.

name: Zambia Revenue Authority TaxOnline
description: ZRA TaxOnline system for revenue collection monitoring and tax compliance reporting.
notes: Daily revenue collection data for budget monitoring.

name: IMF Data Portal
description: IMF data portal for macroeconomic indicators, debt sustainability analysis and fiscal benchmarks.
notes: Used for macroeconomic forecasting and debt sustainability analysis.
